summary: Iteration 68 tested 5 features: poppler-utils fix, normativa fields, dashboard fatturato fix, email importo fix, and invoice workflow buttons. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend tests confirmed all features working. Fixed missing status field in InvoiceEditorPage.js.

fixed_bugs.issue: Missing status field in setFormData when loading invoice - Emetti button was not showing
fixed_bugs.fix: Added status: data.status || 'bozza' to setFormData call at line 177

seed_data_creation: Created test user, client, and invoices for testing workflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 features all working. InvoiceEditorPage.js was fixed to include status field. SDI integration is MOCKED (Aruba keys not configured). Test data cleanup: 2 test invoices remain in emessa status (inv_de3c40e206c1, inv_106086303209), 1 test client (cli_ef4758ec7e38), 1 test commessa (created during testing).

poppler_utils_installation.details: pdftoppm found at /usr/bin/pdftoppm, pdf2image imports successfully

dashboard_fatturato_mensile.details: Months are consecutive (Ott, Nov, Dic, Gen, Feb, Mar), February 2026 included with correct data

commesse_normativa_fields.details: classe_exc and tipologia_chiusura fields work in create/update API and show as badges in CommessaHubPage

invoice_status_transitions.details: PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/status works for bozza→emessa and emessa→pagata. Invalid transitions correctly rejected

invoice_workflow_buttons.details: InvoicesPage: Emetti Documento for bozza, Segna Pagata/Invia SDI for emessa. InvoiceEditorPage: Emetti button for bozza FT/NC, Invia SDI for non-bozza (after fix)

mocked_apis.SDI_Aruba: send-sdi endpoint returns config error due to empty API keys
